function_v0.doc: Read the stored passkey pubkey (for debugging/verification).
function_v0.name: get_passkey

function_v0.doc: Constructor: Automatically called during deployment\nInitializes the contract with the passkey secp256r1 public key (65-byte uncompressed),\nthe DeFindex vault contract address, and the USDC token address.
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc:
Transfer USDC from this contract to a recipient address.
Only the registered passkey can authorize.

`auth_data` and `client_data_json` come from the WebAuthn assertion.
The signature is over SHA256(auth_data || SHA256(client_data_json)).
The challenge inside `client_data_json` must equal SHA256("transfer_usdc" | amount | nonce).
function_v0.name: transfer_usdc

function_v0.doc: Get the fee rates (vault_fee, protocol_fee) in basis points.
function_v0.name: get_vault_fees

function_v0.doc:
Deposit assets into the DeFindex vault.
Only the registered passkey can authorize.

`auth_data` and `client_data_json` come from the WebAuthn assertion.
The signature is over SHA256(auth_data || SHA256(client_data_json)).
The challenge inside `client_data_json` must equal:
SHA256("deposit" || amount1_le || amount2_le || ... || nonce_le)
function_v0.name: deposit_to_vault

function_v0.doc: Get the assets managed by the vault.
function_v0.name: get_vault_assets

function_v0.doc: Read the stored vault contract address.
function_v0.name: get_vault_address

function_v0.doc:
Withdraw assets from the DeFindex vault.
Only the registered passkey can authorize.

`auth_data` and `client_data_json` come from the WebAuthn assertion.
The signature is over SHA256(auth_data || SHA256(client_data_json)).
The challenge inside `client_data_json` must equal:
SHA256("withdraw" || withdraw_shares_le || nonce_le)
function_v0.name: withdraw_from_vault

function_v0.doc: Get the asset amounts corresponding to a given number of vault shares.
function_v0.name: get_vault_amounts_per_shares

function_v0.doc: Get the total managed funds of the vault.
function_v0.name: get_vault_total_managed_funds
